title: You can only attach to running containers

comments.body:
Trying to remove some TODO statements from code
@baude @mheon @umohnani8 PTAL
This breaks kpod run. We need to attach to created containers (attach fires before start to fix a race condition).
So it should only attach to a configured or running container.
I added stopped to that because, when we add the ability to restart containers, we'll need to attach to the stopped container before firing start.
Still, we're probably a ways off getting restarting working, so I'm fine with keeping things this way until we do. One more thing then LGTM

Tests are passing.
PTAL @TomSweeneyRedHat @baude @umohnani8 And merge.
